ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of clothing (e.g., Chinos, Jeans) */,
  "item_style" TEXT /* Style of the clothing (e.g., Slim Fit, Regular Fit) */,
  "item_gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the clothing is designed (e.g., Men, Women) */,
  "item_brand" TEXT /* Brand of the clothing item */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price of the clothing item */,
  "item_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the clothing item */,
  "item_color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "item_material" TEXT /* Material of the clothing item */,
  "item_season" TEXT /* Season for which the clothing is designed */,
  "item_country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin of the clothing item */,
  "item_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was added to the system */,
  "item_status" TEXT /* Status of the item (e.g., active, discontinued) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., 28, 30) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size */,
  "size_category" TEXT /* Category of the size (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement (e.g., Waist, Inseam) */,
  "measurement_description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_measurements" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement for the specific size */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the specific size */,
  "measurement_note" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id", "size_id", "measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the item is stored */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Inventory level at which a reorder is triggered */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the inventory level is low */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., warehouse, store) */,
  "location_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store associate, customer service, admin) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "user_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "order_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item in the order */,
  "item_status" TEXT /* Status of the order item (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "item_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preferred_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred size */,
  "waist" REAL /* Preferred waist measurement */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Preferred inseam measurement */,
  "front_rise" REAL /* Preferred front rise measurement */,
  "seat_back_rise" REAL /* Preferred seat (back rise) measurement */,
  "thigh" REAL /* Preferred thigh measurement */,
  "preferred_color" TEXT /* Preferred color of the customer */,
  "preferred_material" TEXT /* Preferred material of the customer */,
  "preferred_season" TEXT /* Preferred season for the customer */,
  "preferred_brand" TEXT /* Preferred brand of the customer */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer preferences were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_preferred_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)
